pages.title: Login
pages.description: User sign-in screen with email and password.

pages.title: Register
pages.description: Account creation flow for new users.

pages.title: OTP Verification
pages.description: One-time passcode verification step.

pages.title: Forgot Password
pages.description: Password recovery request screen.

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.description: Main dashboard with summary, managers, associations, and reserve studies.

pages.title: Profile
pages.description: View and edit your user profile.

pages.title: Associations
pages.description: All associations list with detail panel (multiple-association view).

pages.title: My Association
pages.description: Single association view with FAQ sidebar.

pages.title: Add Association
pages.description: Four-step wizard (profile, invite, upload, publish) for creating a new association.

pages.title: New Association (legacy)
pages.description: Legacy single-form wizard for creating an association.

pages.title: Reserve Study
pages.description: Reserve study detail view.

pages.title: Upload Reserve Study
pages.description: Upload a new reserve study document.

pages.title: User Manager
pages.description: All users with search, detail panel (identity, address, meta strip) and activity feed.

pages.title: Invite Member
pages.description: Invite a new member to collaborate.

pages.title: Upload Logo Popup
pages.description: Drag-drop brand logo uploader (JPG/PNG, max 2 MB) with preview and Apply.

pages.title: Upload Reserve Study Popup
pages.description: Form-based popup to attach a reserve study document to an association.

pages.title: Invite Intro Popup
pages.description: Onboarding popup explaining how to invite property managers (shown on first dashboard visit).

pages.title: Invite Property Manager Popup
pages.description: Form popup to invite a property manager by name and email.

pages.title: Choose Next Step Popup
pages.description: Company switcher popup listing associations — triggered from the header dropdown.

pages.title: Watch Guide Video Popup
pages.description: Inline video player popup for the Watch Guide cards on the dashboard.

pages.title: Info
pages.description: Generic info page.

pages.title: Posts
pages.description: Posts listing page.
